title: PSGOP Clear

body:
PSG Lag Clear

PSG Lag Clear is a lightweight Minecraft server plugin designed to reduce lag by removing common performance-heavy entities. It focuses only on clearing dropped items and experience orbs, which are frequent causes of TPS drops on busy servers.

The plugin provides a simple /lagclear (alias /lc) command that scans all loaded worlds and safely removes item and XP entities. After execution, it broadcasts how many entities were removed and sends a confirmation message to the command executor.

PSG Lag Clear does not modify chunks, mobs, players, or game mechanics. It is intended as a basic, manual cleanup tool for small to medium servers that want an easy way to manage entity buildup without complex configuration.

Features

Removes dropped item entities

Removes experience orb entities

Works across all loaded worlds

Permission-based command access

Clear broadcast and player feedback messages

Command

/lagclear (alias: /lc)

Permission: psg.lagclear
